---
name: Documentation / workflow correction
about: Report stale, unclear, conflicting, missing, or misleading documentation and operator workflow guidance
title: '[Docs/workflow]: '
labels: ['documentation', 'workflow', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''

---

## Documentation / workflow correction

### Affected document, page, or guidance surface
Name the file, page, section, GitHub URL, issue, workflow, or operator-facing instruction.

### Problem
Describe what is unclear, stale, missing, conflicting, or misleading.

### Correct behavior or wording
Describe what it should say instead, including exact command-lane wording when relevant.

### Evidence
Paste links, screenshots, source references, validation output, or contradictory text.

### Impact
- [ ] Affects collector execution
- [ ] Affects Gemini / prompt-pack workflow
- [ ] Affects operator setup or repo usage
- [ ] Affects validation / testing
- [ ] Affects queue, authority, or governance understanding
- [ ] Minor clarity issue only

### Authority check
Does this conflict with CP-01, CP-02, AGENTS.md, Airtable operating state, or a promoted log?
- [ ] No
- [ ] Yes - identify the conflicting source

### Recommended next action
Describe the needed edit, validation, or escalation.
